summary: TWO_COLUMN: right triangle on the left with always_redraw sides driven by Euclid's parametric formula (a=m²-n², b=2mn, c=m²+n²). Two ValueTrackers m, n sweep through 6 (m,n) pairs producing (3,4,5), (5,12,13), (8,15,17), (12,5,13), (35,12,37), (9,40,41). Right column has live values and a²+b² = c² check.
